lyrics.text: Well you only need the light when it's burning low
lyrics.translation: 只有在朦胧黯淡时才念及灯火光亮

lyrics.text: Only miss the sun when it starts to snow
lyrics.translation: 只有在冰天雪地时才怀念阳光温暖

lyrics.text: Only know you love her when you let her go
lyrics.translation: 只有在已然放手后才始知那是真爱

lyrics.text: Only know you've been high when you're feeling low
lyrics.translation: 只有在身处低谷时才遥想过去峥嵘

lyrics.text: Only hate the road when you're missing home
lyrics.translation: 只有在乡愁涌动时才痛恨旅途遥远

lyrics.text: Only know you love her when you let her go
lyrics.translation: 只有在让她走之后才始知那是真爱

lyrics.text: And you let her go
lyrics.translation: 你却让她走了

lyrics.text: Staring at the bottom of your glass
lyrics.translation: 酒杯已空，醉然凝视。

lyrics.text: Hoping one day you'll make a dream last
lyrics.translation: 希望有一天，你能让梦持续。

lyrics.text: But dreams come slow and they go so fast
lyrics.translation: 但是梦想来的太慢，走得太快。

lyrics.text: You see her when you close your eyes
lyrics.translation: 闭上双眼，整个脑海都是她。

lyrics.text: Maybe one day you'll understand why
lyrics.translation: 也许有一天，你会明白，

lyrics.text: Everything you touch surely dies
lyrics.translation: 自己是如何亲手毁掉了一段爱情

lyrics.text: But you only need the light when it's burning low
lyrics.translation: 但是你只需要朦胧暗淡时的光亮。

lyrics.text: Only miss the sun when it starts to snow
lyrics.translation: 只有在冰天雪地时才怀念阳光温暖

lyrics.text: Only know you love her when you let her go
lyrics.translation: 只有在让她走之后才始知那是真爱

lyrics.text: Only hate the road when you're missing home
lyrics.translation: 只有在乡愁涌动时才痛恨旅途遥远

lyrics.text: Only know you love her when you let her go
lyrics.translation: 只有在让她走之后才始知那是真爱

lyrics.text: Staring at the ceiling in the dark
lyrics.translation: 黑夜中你痴痴地望着天花板

lyrics.text: Same old empty feeling in your heart
lyrics.translation: 又是熟悉的空虚寂寞侵袭着你的心

lyrics.text: Cause love comes slow and it goes so fast
lyrics.translation: 爱情来的太慢，走得太快

lyrics.text: Well you see her when you fall asleep
lyrics.translation: 如今你只得在梦里与她相见

lyrics.text: But never to touch and never to keep
lyrics.translation: 可这梦脆弱的经不起触碰 经不起长久

lyrics.text: Cause you loved her too much and you dive too deep
lyrics.translation: 你爱她越深 你亦而陷的越深

lyrics.translation: 你却让她走了

lyrics.text: Well you let her go
lyrics.translation: 你却让她走了
